$comment: Jurisdiction Rule Config Template. Copy this file, fill in all fields, and validate against jurisdictionRuleConfigSchema.

requiredSections.label: Caption
requiredSections.description: Case caption identifying the court, parties, and cause number.

requiredSections.$comment: Add substantive sections here. Each must have legalElements with statute cites.
requiredSections.label: Section Label
requiredSections.description: What this section is and why it matters, written for self-represented litigants.

requiredSections.label: Certificate of Service
requiredSections.description: Certification that a copy was delivered to the opposing party.
legalElements: Name and address of party served

filingRules.serviceRequirements: How to serve the opposing party, citing the governing rule.

rejectionReasons.howToAvoid: Actionable instruction to prevent this rejection.

warnings.message: Warning message explaining why this matters and what to do.

glossary.plainEnglish: Plain English definition at 8th-grade reading level. Include statute cite and practical example.
